{| class="infobox" style="width:22em; float:right; margin-left:1em"
! colspan="2" style="font-size:110%" | {{{name}}}
|-
| colspan="2" style="text-align:center" | {{{cover|}}}
|-
| Released || {{{released|—}}}
|-
| ISBN || {{{isbn|—}}}
|-
| Publisher || {{{publisher|—}}}
|-
| Pages || {{{pages|—}}}
|}<noinclude>Book infobox (generated).</noinclude>
